caption: A large assembly of people, predominantly men, are seated in tiered rows of light-colored wooden benches in a formal indoor setting. The individuals are dressed in a variety of attire, including white traditional Indian kurtas, button-down shirts, and dark suits. Some wear colorful scarves or sashes over their clothes. Most of the attendees are facing forward with neutral or attentive expressions, though a few are seen talking to neighbors or resting their heads on their hands. The scene remains static across the sequence, with the arrangement of people and their positions remaining largely unchanged, though slight shifts in posture and head movements are visible. The background consists of a repeating pattern of wooden slats, and there is no on-screen text, logos, or equipment visible in the frames.
